"Tiered PR expectations").
-->

## Summary
<!-- 1-3 bullet points: what changes, why -->

## Related issue
<!-- "Closes #N" for larger PRs, or "no issue (small change)" for

## Test plan
<!-- Bulleted markdown checklist of what you verified locally. Examples:
- [ ] `pnpm --filter web run test`
- [ ] `dotnet test apps/api/SharedCookbook.sln`
- [ ] `cd apps/python-extractor && uv run pytest`
- [ ] (manually) clicked through <flow> in browser
-->

## AI-assisted?

     contributions" for the convention. Otherwise, skip this section. -->
